global_description: A small, plump songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a pale grayish-brown plumage with a distinctive rusty cap and a white eye ring. The wings are streaked with brown, and the underparts are light with a buffy wash.

part_details.head: Rounded with a rusty cap and a white eye ring.
part_details.plumage: Overall pale grayish-brown with brown streaks on wings.

spatial_relations: The rusty cap is on top of the head.
The white eye ring encircles the eye.
The wings are attached to the sides of the body.
The tail extends from the rear of the body.
